svg.title: System architecture diagram
svg.desc: Data flow from Next.js frontend through Flask API to sklearn model and back

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Next.js page send to the API?')
sendPrompt('What JSON payload is sent to Flask?')
sendPrompt('What does the Flask route handler do?')
sendPrompt('How does Flask prepare the features for the model?')
sendPrompt('How does Flask return the prediction to the frontend?')
sendPrompt('How was the sklearn model trained?')
sendPrompt('What is the .pkl file used for?')
sendPrompt('How is the prediction result shown to the user?')
